hero_subtitle: SFTY provides executives with a consolidated compliance operating view that tracks audit evidence, case history, and decision logs for enhanced oversight and risk management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness fades across scattered evidence
problem_description: Executives and compliance leaders lack a unified view of audit evidence, logs and case history across fragmented systems. This gap slows risk assessment, complicates oversight and weakens defensibility during internal and external reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates audit evidence, review logs and case history from multiple compliance systems into a unified operating dashboard to support clear risk oversight and stronger regulatory defensibility.
workflow_title: From case creation to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY structures alerts, provider checks and case reviews into documented evidence and decision logs to support audit readiness and executive risk oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One audit-ready view
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides executives with a unified compliance layer that consolidates evidence, case history, and decision logs for clear audit readiness and operational risk control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a governed compliance layer to track audit readiness, preserve evidence and support enterprise deployment with controlled provider orchestration.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance view, connecting workflows, evidence and reports to reduce operational risk and improve audit and regulatory readiness for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY track audit readiness?
faq_2_answer: SFTY tracks audit readiness by preserving evidence, logging decisions and maintaining comprehensive case histories accessible through the risk dashboard for timely compliance review.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve case history?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history by securely recording decision logs, reviewer actions and supporting evidence, supporting complete traceability for audit and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational compliance layer without disrupting existing workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance providers but sits above them, structuring their outputs into auditable workflows, cases and reports to support operational efficiency.
final_title: Review audit evidence and case history with SFTY
final_description: Evaluate how SFTY consolidates compliance evidence, decision logs and case workflows for executive risk oversight and audit readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
